predictor_family.name: recoupling-angle harmonics
predictor_family.definition: Let phi(theta)=atan2(F_21(theta),F_11(theta)) after the frozen M5 gauge. Fit u(theta)-u(theta0) by span{sin(2(phi-phi0)), 1-cos(2(phi-phi0)), sin(4(phi-phi0))}.

validation.coefficient_stability: maximum fold coefficient displacement divided by full-fit coefficient norm

stopping_rule: One frozen evaluation. Do not change basis, folds, interval, thresholds, carrier, observable, or sample count after this commit.

claim_firewall.allowed_if_passed: The preregistered recoupling-angle basis discriminates the declared affine-quotient response better than an equal-dimensional cubic smooth null on this carrier and interval.
forbidden: confirmation outside the declared carrier and interval

evidence_boundary: No statement from the Gemini advisory report is used as evidence.
